chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-1712 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of the Petition. 18.09.2024. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for the Respondent No.2. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Zehrah S. Vayani, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. ----- Mr. Ali Azad Saleem, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the Petitioner, which is taken on record. He has sought to argue that the Petition is maintainable as the Petitioner is a disabled person, who is unable to discharge his duties on the post to which he has been presently assigned. Be that as it may, the essential point is that the Petitioner is admittedly a Civil Servant and has sought to agitate his transfer from such post to another. Needless to say, this Court has no jurisdiction in the matter in view of the bar under Article 212 of the Constitution. The Petitioner may make a Representation to the Competent Authority and thereafter avail such remedy as may be provided under the law. The Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
